concepts.name: Limit
concepts.short_definition: The value a function approaches as the input approaches some value.

concepts.name: Continuity
concepts.short_definition: A function is continuous if its graph can be drawn without lifting the pen.

concepts.name: Instantaneous Rate of Change
concepts.short_definition: The rate at which a quantity changes at a specific moment.

concepts.name: Derivative Definition
concepts.short_definition: The formal definition of a derivative using limits.

concepts.name: Derivative Rules
concepts.short_definition: Techniques for finding derivatives without using the limit definition.

concepts.name: Derivative of Polynomials
concepts.short_definition: Applying differentiation rules to polynomial functions.

concepts.name: Derivative of Trigonometric Functions
concepts.short_definition: Finding the derivatives of sine, cosine, and other trigonometric functions.

concepts.name: Derivative of Exponential Functions
concepts.short_definition: Finding the derivatives of functions with a variable in the exponent.

concepts.name: Applications of Derivatives
concepts.short_definition: Using derivatives to solve real-world problems and analyze function behavior.
